name: escaped-quote-logical-delimiter-routing
description: A real tracker CLI run preserves escaped double quotes in a dippin condition and treats || inside the quoted operand as literal tool output.
given: A temporary .dip workflow whose Emit tool prints say "alpha||beta", whose Matched tool writes routed.txt, and whose Wrong tool writes wrong-ran.txt then exits 23.
when: The locally built tracker binary runs with --no-tui --git=off --backend acp, update checks disabled, no provider credentials, and an isolated temporary workdir.
then: The process exits 0, routed.txt is exactly routed followed by a newline, wrong-ran.txt does not exist, and captured output contains no warnings, errors, or update notices.
validates: real CLI routing through production tool handlers
